(colophon)
r ii' 1'1'

⸢GIM⸣ LIBIR.RA-⸢šu₂⸣ ša₃-ṭir ba-ri₃ SAR mdEN—ZU—⸢PAB⸣

(r ii' 1') Written and checked according to its original. Writer: Bel-leʾu-uṣur, the young scribal apprentice, son of Marduk-bani-apli, scribe of the field marshal, son of Nabu-...-ahhešu, scribe.

r ii' 2'2'

⸢lu₂⸣ša₃-am-lu₃-u₂ šu-bul-tin-bi A mdŠU₂—DU₃—ap-li₉

r ii' 3'3'

[lu₂]⸢A⸣.BA lu₂tur-tan A mdNA₃—x-x—ŠEŠ-MEŠ-šu₂ A.BA
